title: testphp8.2
config:
FROM php:8.2-cli

# Copy de Paths
COPY ./src /opt/executor
WORKDIR /opt/executor

# Install Composer
RUN curl -sS https://getcomposer.org/installer -o composer-setup.php && \
    php composer-setup.php --install-dir=/usr/local/bin --filename=composer
RUN echo "deb http://archive.debian.org/debian stretch main" > /etc/apt/sources.list
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y git zip unzip
RUN rm -f package.lock
RUN composer require phpunit/phpunit:^9.5

ARG SDK_DIR
COPY $SDK_DIR /opt/sdk-php
RUN composer config repositories.sdk-php path /opt/sdk-php
RUN composer require processmaker/sdk-php:@dev

# Install dependences of system and configure the Microsoft Repository
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y gnupg2 curl
RUN curl -sSL https://packages.microsoft.com/keys/microsoft.asc | gpg --dearmor > /etc/apt/trusted.gpg.d/microsoft.gpg
RUN curl -sSL https://packages.microsoft.com/config/ubuntu/20.04/prod.list > /etc/apt/sources.list.d/mssql-release.list 
RUN apt-get update 
RUN ACCEPT_EULA=Y apt-get -y --no-install-recommends install msodbcsql17 unixodbc-dev 
RUN pecl install sqlsrv
RUN pecl install pdo_sqlsrv
RUN docker-php-ext-enable sqlsrv pdo_sqlsrv





## Section for the configuration of the connection to ProcessMaker instance 
RUN echo "https://cuny-ccny.cloud.processmaker.net" > /baseurl.env
RUN echo "32?146" > /scriptid.env
RUN echo "/CunyFunctions.php" > /outputfile.env
RUN echo "6" > /clientid.env
RUN echo "dl7G4t0jIcai8s5kkaCzZfCvyZVWZ3h0mi5u2d1K" > /clientsecret.env
RUN echo "executoruser" > /username.env
RUN echo "Passw0rd.!" > /password.env
RUN date +%s > /random.env
## End of section

RUN  apt-get install -y curl jq && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN rm -f $(cat /outputfile.env)
RUN rm -f /token.env

RUN curl -X "POST" \
  "$(cat /baseurl.env)/oauth/token?$(cat /random.env)" \
  -H "accept: application/json" \
  -F "grant_type=password" \
  -F "client_id=$(cat /clientid.env)" \
  -F "client_secret=$(cat /clientsecret.env)" \
  -F "username=$(cat /username.env)" \
  -F "password=$(cat /password.env)" | \
  jq -r ".access_token" > /token.env

RUN curl -X "GET" \
  "$(cat /baseurl.env)/api/1.0/scripts/$(cat /scriptid.env)?$(cat /random.env)" \
  -H "accept: application/json" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $(cat /token.env)" | \
  jq -r ".code" > $(cat /outputfile.env)
